## 1. New LLM Versions / Major AI Lab Tools

- 2026-03-28 | [Fortune: Anthropic testing “Mythos” after leak](https://fortune.com/2026/03/26/anthropic-says-testing-mythos-powerful-new-ai-model-after-data-leak-reveals-its-existence-step-change-in-capabilities/) | Anthropic acknowledged it is testing a new general-purpose model, described as a “step change,” with advances in reasoning, coding, and cybersecurity; rollout is limited to early-access users after leaked draft materials exposed the effort.  
Why it matters: This is the clearest current signal that Anthropic is treating cyber capability as a release-gating risk, not just a benchmark win.

- 2026-03-28 | [Google: Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio update](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/gemini/gemini-audio-model-updates/) | Google released an updated native-audio model for live voice agents, now available in AI Studio and Vertex AI and rolling into Gemini Live and Search Live; Google says function calling and instruction-following improved materially.  
Why it matters: Voice agents are moving from demo UX to deployable workflow tooling, with better real-time action-taking and lower interaction friction.

## 9. Podcast Highlights

- 2026-03-29 | Links: [AI Daily Brief episode](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EBXZ4zZwS7c), [Fortune report](https://fortune.com/2026/03/26/anthropic-says-testing-mythos-powerful-new-ai-model-after-data-leak-reveals-its-existence-step-change-in-capabilities/) | Anthropic Mythos: a leaked draft surfaced a higher-end Anthropic model in early access. Available now: no public release; limited testing only. How to use: there is no public workflow yet; relevant action is monitoring Anthropic access channels and cyber-safety disclosures. Why it matters: the notable fact is not just capability, but Anthropic explicitly tying release caution to offensive cyber potential.

- 2026-03-29 | Links: [AI Daily Brief episode](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EBXZ4zZwS7c), [Google Search Live update](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/live-audio-gemini-model-update/), [Google native-audio model update](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/gemini/gemini-audio-model-updates/) | Google live audio stack: the podcast highlighted Gemini’s low-latency conversational voice push. Available now: updated native audio is live in AI Studio and Vertex AI; Search Live rollout is underway in the U.S. How to use: consumers open the Google app and tap `Live`; builders use Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio in AI Studio or Vertex AI for voice agents. Why it matters: practical agent value is shifting toward continuous voice, function calling, and multimodal live assistance.

- 2026-03-29 | Links: [AI Daily Brief episode](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EBXZ4zZwS7c), [Shopify Winter ’26 Edition](https://www.shopify.com/editions/winter2026), [Shopify merchant writeup](https://www.shopify.com/news/winter-26-edition-merchant) | Shopify Tinker: Shopify is packaging AI creation tools into a single entrepreneur-facing app. Available now: not broadly live in the cited Shopify materials; current state is notify/preview positioning. How to use: join the notify flow on the Editions page; current alternatives remain Shopify Magic and Sidekick inside Shopify. Why it matters: Shopify is collapsing fragmented SMB AI tooling into a bundled commerce workflow, which is a stronger distribution play than standalone creator apps.

- 2026-03-29 | Links: [AI Daily Brief episode](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EBXZ4zZwS7c), [Codex cloud docs](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cloud), [Docs MCP](https://platform.openai.com/docs/docs-mcp), [The Verge on adult-mode pause](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/901293/openai-adult-mode-erotic-chatbot-shelved-indefinitely) | OpenAI Codex plus product focus: the episode framed Codex as gaining more extensibility while OpenAI deprioritizes adult-mode work. Available now: Codex is available on eligible ChatGPT plans; adult mode remains paused. How to use: open `chatgpt.com/codex`, connect GitHub, and optionally add Docs MCP for documentation retrieval inside agent workflows. Why it matters: OpenAI’s near-term posture is enterprise agent utility and integration depth, not boundary-pushing consumer chat features.
